objects.name: TangleCrypt
objects.description: A custom malware packer for Windows, using multiple layers of base64 encoding, LZ78 compression, and XOR encryption.

objects.name: STONESTOP
objects.description: Malicious payload embedded in executables, acts as an EDR killer and leverages the ABYSSWORKER driver.

objects.name: ABYSSWORKER
objects.description: Malicious kernel driver used for process termination and file deletion, also known as POORTRY and BURNTCIGAR.

objects.name: HeartCrypt
objects.description: Malware packer documented by Palo Alto, used to pack STONESTOP samples.

objects.name: VMProtect
objects.description: Commercial packer/protector used on several samples before custom packing.
